name: Temptation Fall - Succubus & Monster Girl Battle Fuck Survival RPG
description:
Four years ago, a Succubus Queen invaded Earth with a legion of Succubi and various Monster Girl Subspecies. Earth became an erotic playground of danger and temptation, where humans were seen as nothing more than slaves and cattle. After two years of battling Monster Girls, most of humanity regrouped in a last stand attempt called Operation: Temptation Fall. But on that day, humanity fell.
In response to humanity's last organized defense, the Succubus Queen made a mockery of the situation. She claimed that city as her own and dubbing it Temptation Fall City - Earth's Succubi Capital. Now, the neon-lit streets of the city are bathed in eternal pink twilight, echoing with the whispers of seduction and debauchery.
Today, two years since Temptation Fall, the last remaining Human Resistance City was conquered. By a stroke of luck, you were able to make it out before your friends and fellow survivors were largely captured. With all seeming lost, you must cling to hope while navigating a transformed land where charm, tricks, sex, and enslavement are ever lurking.
Choose your perspective in this open world rogue-like survival battle (fuck) RPG. Explore, learn, fight, survive. How you go about your journey is up to you. Of course, you could just surrender to the first temptation you cross paths with. Or you could venture forth, seeking holy relics and weaponry to battle against the sex demons milking your friends for sustenance. You may even meet an ally or free other humans from slave camps...

The question remains: Will you rise as a beacon of hope for the few that remain or become another victim of Temptation Fall?

...
